es.ubu.lsi.server

Class ChatServerImpl.ServerThreadForClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Thread
      • es.ubu.lsi.server.ChatServerImpl.ServerThreadForClient
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Runnable
    Enclosing class:
    ChatServerImpl

    private class ChatServerImpl.ServerThreadForClient
extends java.lang.Thread
    One instance of this thread will run for each client.
